options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: deathlink
options.description: When you die, everyone who enabled death link dies. Of course, the reverse is true too.

options.name: ringlink
options.description: Enable Ring Link for use with games that support it. Incoming rings are converted to the current level's Hit counter.

options.name: victory_condition
options.description:
Choose your victory condition.
Andross or Robot Andross - Defeat either Andross or Robot Andross
Andross and Robot Andross - Defeat both Andross and Robot Andross
Andross - Defeat Andross in Venom 2

options.name: required_medals
options.description:
Require a certain number of medals before you can enter Venom 2.
The same requirment will apply for Venom 1 if your victory condition is 'Andross or Robot Andross'

options.name: level_access
options.description:
Completing a level a certain way will give a random item.
Choose what type of level access item gets added to the pool.

Shuffle Levels - You will receive levels as items which will allow you to select that level at any time.
Shuffle Paths - You will receive paths as items which will allow you to take that path to other levels.

options.name: shuffle_starting_level
options.description:
If Level Access is 'Shuffle Levels', shuffle which level you start with.
You normally start with Corneria.

options.name: shuffle_medals
options.description:
Shuffle the medals awarded by reaching a certain number of Hits in each level.
Earning a medal will give a random item, and you will visually see the medal on the map to indicate that you've completed the check.

Note: Medals are very challenging in vanilla.
Unless you know what you're doing, it is recommended to lower the score needed for each level using their options.

options.name: shuffle_checkpoints
options.description:
Shuffle checkpoints rings for the levels that have them.
You will not be able to use the checkpoint ring in a level until you receive the item for it.

options.name: accomplished_sends_complete
options.description: Getting 'Mission Accomplished' on any level will also count as getting 'Mission Complete' for that level.

options.name: radio_rando
options.description: Randomize the radio dialog.

options.name: engine_glow
options.description: Set the color of your engine's glow.

options.name: default_lives
options.description: Set the number of lives (Arwings) you start with and reset to after a game over.

options.name: medal_corneria
options.description: Set the score required to earn the medal on Corneria.

options.name: medal_meteo
options.description: Set the score required to earn the medal on Meteo.

options.name: medal_sector_y
options.description: Set the score required to earn the medal on Sector Y.

options.name: medal_katina
options.description: Set the score required to earn the medal on Katina.

options.name: medal_fortuna
options.description: Set the score required to earn the medal on Fortuna.

options.name: medal_aquas
options.description: Set the score required to earn the medal on Aquas.

options.name: medal_solar
options.description: Set the score required to earn the medal on Solar.

options.name: medal_sector_x
options.description: Set the score required to earn the medal on Sector X.

options.name: medal_zoness
options.description: Set the score required to earn the medal on Zoness.

options.name: medal_titania
options.description: Set the score required to earn the medal on Titania.

options.name: medal_sector_z
options.description: Set the score required to earn the medal on Sector Z.

options.name: medal_macbeth
options.description: Set the score required to earn the medal on Macbeth.

options.name: medal_area_6
options.description: Set the score required to earn the medal on Area 6.

options.name: medal_bolse
options.description: Set the score required to earn the medal on Bolse.

options.name: medal_venom
options.description: Set the score required to earn the medal on Venom.

options.name: local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be in their native world.

options.name: non_local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be outside their native world.

options.name: start_inventory
options.description: Start with the specified amount of these items. Example: "Bomb: 1"

options.name: start_hints
options.description: Start with these item's locations prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: start_location_hints
options.description: Start with these locations and their item prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: item_links
options.description: Share part of your item pool with other players.

options.name: plando_items
options.description: Generic items plando.

options.name: start_inventory_from_pool
options.description:
Start with the specified amount of these items and don't place them in the world. Example: "Bomb: 1"

The game decides what the replacement items will be.
